title: ateleia arsenii
intro: Ateleia arsenii, also known as Ateleia sclerosa, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ateleia arsenii include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. Ateleia arsenii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts can be used in various medicinal formulations.
